extra.reasoning: The input back_pain does not appear in any rule (r1: leg_swelling, r2: focal_weakness, r3: pallor, r4: vision_loss) nor in the default assignment. Therefore back_pain has no effect on the computed acuity. For any fixed assignment of the other four inputs, the set of matching rules and the priority/order conflict resolution are identical regardless of back_pain's value, so acuity is unchanged when back_pain is toggled true. Since acuity stays equal, it is necessarily no lower than before, satisfying the monotonicity property across the entire input space. Property holds.
